title: arcytophyllum laricifolium

This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that may help to reduce stress and promote relaxation. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
